item.title: Revised US Digital Asset Market Clarity Act draft released July 22 with temporary ethics provision; Senate vote date not set
DTCC completed first live tokenized trades in Russell 1000 stocks, ETFs, and Treasuries on July 15 with 40+ Wall Street firms
Stripe, Visa, Mastercard, Coinbase, and BlackRock backed Open USD stablecoin network with 140+ founding partners
SEC placed three crypto rulemakings on July agenda covering token issuance, broker-dealer custody, and trading venues
EU MiCA grandfathering period expired July 1; CASPs without authorization are barred from serving EU customers
FDIC, OCC, and Federal Reserve issued joint risk management guidance for banks conducting crypto-asset safekeeping
US banking regulators rescinded prior guidance that had discouraged banks from engaging in crypto custody and services
Wanchain's Cardano-to-BNB Chain bridge lost $10M on July 21 after attacker exploited a signature reuse vulnerability
Ostium Protocol lost approximately $18M after attacker used a compromised price oracle to manipulate BTC/USD positions
CFTC filed civil enforcement action against a commodity pool operator for $14M in alleged crypto-related investment fraud
GENIUS Act stablecoin licensing rules remain unfinished one year after the legislation was signed into law
DTCC tokenization service was cleared by SEC no-action letter in December 2025 enabling on-chain US equities settlement
